textByHash.15bc1fb71a03cad78a6f39b97154201074595779: but there is one cap'n I reckon might 'elp. I 'eard there's a retired 'un who lives in Draynor Village who's so desperate to sail again 'e'd take any job.
textByHash.1837c12b4155309b164f246631b1d7be2fc6144d: Aye, I will, but I reckon I'm all good fer now.
textByHash.26b256944a87e8bc322a4e51111436774bbfb86a: How d'ye think I'm doin', Cap'n? I'm dead!
textByHash.2a98a58902742cc49b45c22b23d4533b1dedad2a: Ahoy! What d'ye think of yer ship then?
textByHash.4592317c082a71be50347a29421e77b7156f032a: Not me, sir! I'm just an 'umble cabin boy. You'll need a proper cap'n.
textByHash.6873dbb1d3bf9d75c8e3da04f2687cc8f511de73: S'pose me business ain't done yet. Gotta find me a purpose or somethin'.
textByHash.70ba2e2c40115e1e14de6794d0318e5862f6d76d: S'pose I'm alright. Still tryin' t' find me a purpose or somethin' though.
textByHash.734459d0eb82d84345dfebcd77169e1e7bca0339: Aye, best ye' make sure ye' know what yer doin' this time, though s'pose it ain't like ye' can get me killed again!
textByHash.7967ae0b65a83af87ebe76671d9f26f8b69eec3a: Well, s'pose it ain't like ye' can get me killed again!
textByHash.7ccb91d46497d5b36e35b7c8c70080cc3a96e4ec: I s'pose, but I ain't sure 'ow big of an upside that is really.
textByHash.82370fc81c4c1e62bba17f2454b7ef36180f65f3: The cap'ns round 'ere seem to be a mite scared of Crandor. I ask 'em why and they just say it was afore my time,
textByHash.8a5329ef404b926eb98516c5e923c286bc2b5e68: I can't remember 'is name, but 'e lives in Draynor Village an' makes rope.
textByHash.b84314d19fbe98f6d416ded111185daa33118625: Reckon ye' need t' work on yer skills a bit first, considerin' what happened first time round.
textByHash.c546c2a4e12e33e2926a101d0efd3e0c23d3c838: Looks like there's a storm coming up, cap'n. Soon we won't be able to see anything!
textByHash.d94cebc41161b9d61811526673c922a76b3b7d3f: Nice to see ye' remember me, seein' as you watched me die 'n all!
